## Description
<!-- Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. -->
<!-- E.g. "Closes #123" -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactor or performance improvement

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have verified the app runs without crashing locally (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings in the console
- [ ] I have tested this change against multiple modules/queries if applicable
